query:
-- Check claims with damage photos
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_claims,
  SUM(CASE WHEN damage_photos IS NOT NULL AND damage_photos != '[]' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as claims_with_photos,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN damage_photos IS NOT NULL AND damage_photos != '[]' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) as photo_population_percent
FROM claims;

  COUNT(*) as total_claims,
  SUM(CASE WHEN damage_photos IS NOT NULL AND damage_photos != '[]' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as claims_with_photos,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN damage_photos IS NOT NULL AND damage_photos != '[]' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) as photo_population_percent
FROM claims;
